signals.title: Social Media Child Protection Act (H.R.821)
signals.summary: This bill prohibits individuals under 16 from accessing social media platforms and mandates age verification through valid identification. It requires platforms to ensure the confidentiality and security of user information.
key_provisions: Prohibits individuals under 16 from accessing social media platforms
Mandates age verification through valid identification
Requires confidentiality and security of user information

signals.title: Kids PRIVACY Act (H.R.2801)
signals.summary: This act expands requirements for digital services handling personal information of individuals under 18, requiring express consent before processing certain information and allowing minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information.
key_provisions: Expands requirements for digital services handling personal information of individuals under 18
Requires express consent before processing certain personal information
Allows minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information

signals.title: Protecting Kids on Social Media Act (H.R.6149 and S.1291)
signals.summary: This legislation mandates age verification for social media account holders, prohibits individuals under 13 from accessing social media platforms, and requires parental consent for users aged 13 to 17.
key_provisions: Mandates age verification for social media account holders
Prohibits individuals under 13 from accessing social media platforms
Requires parental consent for users aged 13 to 17

signals.title: Verifying Kids’ Online Privacy Act (H.R.7534)
signals.summary: This act amends COPPA to redefine 'child' as individuals under 16 and requires operators to verify the age of users accessing their services.
key_provisions: Amends COPPA to redefine 'child' as individuals under 16
Requires operators to verify the age of users accessing their services

signals.title: Children and Teens’ Online Privacy Protection Act (H.R.7890)
signals.summary: This act strengthens protections related to the online collection, use, and disclosure of personal information of children and teens, amending COPPA to enhance privacy safeguards for minors.
key_provisions: Strengthens protections related to the online collection, use, and disclosure of personal information of children and teens
Amends COPPA to enhance privacy safeguards for minors

signals.title: Kids Online Safety Act (S.1409)
signals.summary: This act requires platforms to provide safeguards and parental controls tailored to minors' ages and developmental needs, prohibiting advertising of illegal products to minors.
key_provisions: Requires platforms to provide safeguards and parental controls tailored to minors' ages and developmental needs
Prohibits advertising of illegal products to minors

signals.title: DOJ Lawsuit Against TikTok for Children's Privacy Violations
signals.summary: The Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against TikTok Inc. and ByteDance Ltd. for alleged violations of COPPA, claiming that TikTok collected personal information from children under 13 without parental consent.
key_provisions: Alleged violations of COPPA by collecting personal information from children under 13 without parental consent

signals.title: Executive Order on Enhancing Children's Online Safety
signals.summary: This executive order mandates the FTC to develop stricter guidelines for age verification mechanisms and requires the DOJ to increase enforcement actions against platforms failing to protect minors.
key_provisions: Mandates FTC to develop stricter guidelines for age verification mechanisms
Requires DOJ to increase enforcement actions against platforms failing to protect minors
